ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "channel_title" TEXT /* Title of the channel that uploaded the video */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the video belongs to */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Date and time the video was published */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the video has received */,
  "thumbnail_link" TEXT /* URL to the video's thumbnail */,
  "comments_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether comments are disabled for the video */,
  "ratings_disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether ratings are disabled for the video */,
  "video_error_or_removed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the video is an error or has been removed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the video (e.g., 'HD', 'SD') */,
  "caption" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the video has captions */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the video's location */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the video's location */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date and time the video was recorded */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel that uploaded the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_title" TEXT /* Title of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL of the channel */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers the channel has */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trending_videos" (
  "trending_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trending video */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video that is trending */,
  "trending_date" TEXT /* Date the video was trending */,
  "trending_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the video on the trending list */,
  "trending_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in days the video has been trending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trending_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trending_videos_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "video_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video tag */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video the tag is associated with */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the video */,
  "tag_weight" REAL /* Weight or relevance score for the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., 'keyword', 'hashtag') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tags_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_comments" (
  "video_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video the comment is associated with */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the comment has received */,
  "commenter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was posted */,
  "comment_edit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been moderated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_comments_commenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commenter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher', 'analyst', 'administrator') */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_likes" (
  "video_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video like */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video the like is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the video */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the video was liked */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the like is still active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_dislikes" (
  "video_dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video dislike */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video the dislike is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who disliked the video */,
  "dislike_date" TEXT /* Date the video was disliked */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the dislike is still active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_dislikes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)
